children.text: a description of the activities authorized under this subpart that the institution proposes to carry out, and how such institution plans to conduct such activities in order to further the purpose of this subpart;
a description of how the institution consulted with a broad range of people within the institution to develop activities for which assistance is sought;
a description of how the institution will coordinate and collaborate with the office that provides services to students with disabilities within the institution; and

a description of the extent to which the institution will work to replicate the research-based and best practices of institutions of higher education with demonstrated effectiveness in serving students with disabilities.
